answers: Inventory management: tracking what you have, what you need, and when to reorder. Balance between too much and too little stock.
Methods: FIFO (first in first out), LIFO (last in first out), JIT (just in time — minimize stock), ABC analysis (prioritize high-value).
Tips: use inventory software, set reorder points, do regular cycle counts, and analyze demand patterns.
ABC analysis: A items (20% of stock, 80% of value) — track closely. B items moderate. C items (bulk of items, low value) — simple tracking.
